mapper.select: SELECT id, bank_name AS bankName, account_number AS accountNumber, account_holder AS accountHolder, visible, display_order AS displayOrder, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, created_by AS createdBy, updated_by AS updatedBy FROM bank_account ORDER BY display_order ASC

SELECT id, bank_name AS bankName, account_number AS accountNumber, account_holder AS accountHolder, visible, display_order AS displayOrder, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, created_by AS createdBy, updated_by AS updatedBy FROM bank_account WHERE visible = true ORDER BY display_order ASC

SELECT id, bank_name AS bankName, account_number AS accountNumber, account_holder AS accountHolder, visible, display_order AS displayOrder, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, created_by AS createdBy, updated_by AS updatedBy FROM bank_account WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO bank_account ( bank_name, account_number, account_holder, visible, display_order, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{req.bankName}, #{req.accountNumber}, #{req.accountHolder}, COALESCE(#{req.visible}, true),
COALESCE( #{req.displayOrder}, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(display_order), 0) + 1 FROM bank_account) ),
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{createdBy}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE bank_account SET bank_name = #{req.bankName}, account_number = #{req.accountNumber}, account_holder = #{req.accountHolder}, visible = #{req.visible}, display_order = #{req.displayOrder}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE bank_account SET display_order = sub.new_order FROM ( SELECT id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY display_order ASC) AS new_order FROM bank_account ) sub WHERE bank_account.id = sub.id
